name: Prakhar Saxena
about: Engineering and AI platform leader who solves enterprise business problems through **People, Process, and Technology**. Currently lead a 20-person organization—principal and senior engineers, senior business analysts, a product owner, and a team lead—owning the long-term strategy, roadmap, and delivery of UWM's enterprise AI automation platform. Built that platform from the ground up into the company's largest deployment of Google LLMs, generating multimillion-dollar annual savings and returning over a million workhours to the business. Scrum.org Certified Professional Scrum Master driving outcomes across cross-functional Agile teams.

roles.title: Team Leader — AI Platforms & Product Development
roles.description: Lead a 20-person organization owning strategy, roadmap, and delivery of UWM's enterprise AI automation platform (BOLT).
bullets: Built UWM's document-interrogation automation platform from the ground up — now the largest enterprise deployment of Google LLMs at the company.
Delivered ~$4.1M in annualized savings ($346K/month) from a strategic platform optimization.
Returned ~1M+ underwriter hours per year to the business (~500 full-time work-years of reclaimed capacity).
Architected ML solutions using Google Gemini, custom-trained models, and embeddings across Title Review, Assets, Pay Stubs, Credit Reports, and Appraisals.

roles.title: Software Developer III
bullets: Led currency-management efforts reducing technical debt and eliminating security vulnerabilities across BOLT services.
Led a cohort of summer team members through a full-stack microservices project (React + .NET 8), achieving 75% retention.

roles.title: Data Platform Engineer II
bullets: Administered an on-premises Confluent Kafka platform at 99.99% availability, processing billions of messages daily.
Supported 1,900+ technology professionals integrating with Kafka, Redis, and Qlik; ran the Redis cache at ~4,000 ops/second.
Pioneered open-source Kafka adoption and migrated Kafka connectors into Kubernetes via custom Python tooling.

roles.title: Software Developer
bullets: Sole maintainer of a full-stack trading application ecosystem at 99.999% availability within an AWS Kubernetes cluster.
Designed and built Java/Spring gateways bridging legacy trading frameworks to NASDAQ's consolidated Fusion platform.
Delivered back-end services integrating multiple international NASDAQ exchanges through transatlantic (US–Europe) collaboration.

education.extras: Minor in Data Science • Concentration in Artificial Intelligence • Concentration in Computer & Network Security

projects.name: SF Crime Classification
projects.description: Machine Learning project using SVM, Decision Trees, KNN, and K-Means with PCA to classify San Francisco crime data.

projects.name: Weather & Crime Analysis
projects.description: Data science investigation into how weather patterns and socioeconomic factors correlate with urban crime rates.

projects.name: Project Euler Solutions
projects.description: Solutions to mathematical and computational programming challenges in JavaScript.

projects.name: College Projects
projects.description: Collection of coursework spanning AI, Advanced AI, Machine Learning, Data Mining, Cloud Computing, and more.
